items.text: GeoFence_singleton maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.requirement_fragment: GeoFence_singleton maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: GeoFence_singleton invokes circleLinearization function from geofence_nodes library with t as parameter to compute distanceFromFence

items.text: GeoFence_singleton sets output port timeToRecovery to 1.7

items.text: When simulation time t >= recovery time, distanceFromFence at current time instance > distanceFromFence at previous time instance
